data.title: Update project docs to reflect unified primary ticket model
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and other existing documentation to reflect the new primary ticket terminology, clarity gate, and routing rules.
**Why**: Documentation must reflect the new sprint entry behavior so future agents and practitioners understand the unified model.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section, quick reference table, task start workflow; any other docs that reference "epic-only" sprint behavior
- OUT: New documentation files — only update existing docs

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md reflects that /dso:sprint accepts any ticket type as the primary ticket, describes the 3-layer clarity gate, and documents the routing rules (epics → preplanning, non-epics → complexity eval, bugs → fix-bug)
  ← Satisfies: all success criteria (documentation reflects implemented behavior)
- When this story is complete, the quick reference table in CLAUDE.md is updated with the new terminology and commands
  ← Satisfies: all success criteria (documentation reflects implemented behavior)
